name: components/calendar
description: An interactive date-picker calendar grid that allows users to browse months and years and select individual dates. Provides a complete composition system with Calendar, CalendarNav, CalendarGrid, CalendarGridHeader, CalendarGridBody, CalendarHeaderCell, CalendarCell, CalendarCellTrigger, and related primitives. Supports navigation chevrons, year/month pagination, and selected-date highlighting. Built on Corvu Calendar with full ARIA grid semantics and keyboard arrow navigation.
useCases: Inline date selection in booking and reservation forms
Birthdate or anniversary pickers in user-profile edit flows
Date-range visualization in analytics dashboards showing activity heatmaps
Scheduling tools where users click a calendar cell to create or edit an event
usage: import { Calendar, CalendarNav, CalendarGrid, CalendarGridHeader, CalendarGridBody, CalendarHeaderCell, CalendarCell, CalendarCellTrigger } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/calendar"
